title: Spec Name Validation Schema
description: Validates feature/spec names used across agent-os and design-os commands

errorMessage.pattern: Spec name must be lowercase, alphanumeric, and hyphens only (no underscores, spaces, or special characters)
errorMessage.minLength: Spec name must be at least 3 characters long
errorMessage.maxLength: Spec name must not exceed 50 characters
